From a single Automatic mixing equipment to 7 product lines across all categories, we help foodservice businesses in 30+ countries achieve cost reduction, efficiency gains, and consistent output.

about_story_p1: Founded in 2003 in Foshan, Guangdong - China's products manufacturing hub - {brand} started in a small engineering workshop with a single goal: transforming products manufacturings through intelligent automation. Over 20 years of continuous R&D and market validation, {brand} has grown into a fully integrated products manufacturer spanning R&D, production, and sales.
about_story_p2: Today, our 7 product lines serve customers in 30+ countries - from chain brands in Bangkok to central productions in Ho Chi Minh City, from brand owners in Kuala Lumpur to health brand brands in Jakarta. Whether you run a street food stall or a thousand-store chain, {brand} can help you save labor, standardize output, and scale efficiently.

cases_quote_af-weight-brand: The extremely low MOQ and 5-day sampling gave us the confidence to test new products. YuKoLi's African compliance guidance helped us avoid major pitfalls.
cases_quote_au-tea-chain: From flavor tuning to Australian label compliance, YuKoLi ensured consistent taste across all our stores. They are the most reliable supply backbone for chain brands.
cases_quote_cn-new-consumer: From 0 to 1 formula co-creation to rapid full-link delivery, YuKoLi helped us launch a viral hit in a red ocean market, keeping us ahead.
cases_quote_eu-collagen-brand: EU standards are extremely strict. YuKoLi not only passed ISO certification but also provided multi-specification flexible customization, perfectly matching our premium brand positioning.
cases_quote_jp-functional-drink: The Japanese market is notoriously picky about ingredients and quality control. YuKoLi's deep R&D and precision manufacturing gave us complete confidence for local compliance.
cases_quote_mideast-meal-brand: The Middle East has strict compliance. YuKoLi's authentic Halal certification and flexible small packaging quickly won local consumers' trust for our e-commerce launch.
cases_quote_na-probiotic-brand: YuKoLi's comprehensive FDA registration and cold chain solutions resolved our compliance and probiotic viability challenges, ensuring smooth entry into the North American market.
cases_quote_sea-coffee-brand: YuKoLi's precise flavor tuning perfectly matched our local market. Their 7-day sampling and FDA compliance got us to launch much faster.

privacy_policy_intro: Foshan Yueqianli Technology Co., Ltd. (hereinafter referred to as "we") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information.
privacy_section_10_content: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date. Continued use of our services constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy_section_11_content: For privacy-related questions, please contact us via WhatsApp, email at support@brew.yukoli.com, or through the contact form on our website.
privacy_section_12_content: We use Facebook Pixel and similar tracking technologies to: (a) measure ad effectiveness; (b) build target audiences for future ads; (c) track conversions from Facebook ads. You can opt out of Facebook tracking via Facebook ad preferences or your browser's Do Not Track setting.
privacy_section_13_content: Our services are not directed to individuals under 18. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If you believe we have collected data from a minor, please contact us immediately.
privacy_section_14_content: We do not use automated decision-making or profiling that produces legal effects. All business decisions involve human review.
privacy_section_1_content: When you contact us or request a quote, we may collect personal information such as your name, email address, phone number, and company details. We also collect non-personal information such as browser type and IP address.
privacy_section_2_content: We use your information to: (a) process your inquiries and provide quotes; (b) communicate regarding orders and delivery; (c) provide after-sales support; (d) send product updates and promotions with your consent.
privacy_section_3_content: We process your data based on: (a) necessity for contract performance; (b) legitimate interests for business operations; (c) your consent for marketing; (d) legal compliance requirements.
privacy_section_4_content: We do not sell your personal data. We may share information with: (a) shipping and logistics partners; (b) payment processors; (c) authorities as required by law.
privacy_section_5_content: As an international business, your data may be transferred to China and other countries where our service providers are located for processing. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place.
privacy_section_6_content: We implement industry-standard security measures, including encryption, access controls, and regular security audits, to protect your data from unauthorized access or disclosure.
privacy_section_7_content: You have the right to: (a) access your personal data; (b) request correction or deletion; (c) object to processing; (d) withdraw consent; (e) request data portability. Contact us to exercise these rights.
privacy_section_8_content: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your browsing experience, analyze website traffic, and personalize content. You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings.
privacy_section_9_content: We retain your personal data for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy, comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce agreements.

solutions_obm_cta_desc: Ready to create a brand from scratch? Let us discuss your vision and build something remarkable together.
solutions_obm_hero_desc: From Zero to One, We Build Your Brand
solutions_obm_section_desc: From zero to one, we build your brand together. Full-chain support covering brand strategy, product development, market operations, and continuous iteration — so you can focus on growth.
solutions_obm_section_desc_cn: From zero to one, we build your brand. Full-chain support: brand strategy, product development, marketing, and continuous iteration.
solutions_obm_service_dev_desc: Product Development — Formula R&D, prototyping, testing, and production. We turn concepts into market-ready products.
solutions_obm_service_iterate_desc: Continuous Iteration — Data-driven product optimization, line extensions, and seasonal updates to stay competitive.
solutions_obm_service_ops_desc: Market Operations — Channel strategy, digital marketing support, and trade marketing. We help you reach customers.
solutions_obm_service_strategy_desc: Brand Strategy — Market research, positioning, brand identity, and go-to-market strategy. We help you define your brand DNA.
solutions_odm_cta_desc: Ready to launch your own brand? Get a free product concept and sample within 7 days.
solutions_odm_hero_desc: We Develop the Formula, You Build the Brand
solutions_odm_section_desc: We develop the formula, you build the brand. From recipe R&D to packaging design, we deliver a turnkey private label solution so you can focus on sales.
solutions_odm_section_desc_cn: We develop the formula, you build the brand. End-to-end private label service from formula to finished goods.
solutions_odm_service_formula_desc: Formula R&D — 200+ recipe library. Custom formulation by our R&D team to match your market needs.
solutions_odm_service_label_desc: Private Label — Your brand, our product. Full customization from flavor profile to packaging design.
solutions_odm_service_onestop_desc: One-Stop Production — From raw material sourcing to finished goods. MOQ 5,000+, ready in 45–60 days.
solutions_odm_service_packaging_desc: Packaging Design — Professional packaging design that matches your brand identity. From concept to print-ready files.
solutions_oem_cta_desc: Get a tailored manufacturing quote within 24 hours. NDA included.
solutions_oem_hero_desc: You Supply the Formula, We Handle the Rest
solutions_oem_section_desc: You supply the formula and raw materials, we deliver finished products at scale. Full recipe confidentiality guaranteed with rigorous quality control at every step.
solutions_oem_section_desc_cn: You supply the formula, we handle production. Strict recipe confidentiality, batch manufacturing, full quality inspection.
solutions_oem_service_batch_desc: Batch Production — MOQ 10,000+. Scalable from pilot run to full-scale manufacturing.
solutions_oem_service_contract_desc: Contract Manufacturing — Your formula, our production lines. Precise execution guaranteed.
solutions_oem_service_quality_desc: Quality Reports — FDA/HACCP/ISO certified. Full inspection and documentation per batch.
solutions_oem_service_recipe_desc: Recipe Confidentiality — Strict NDA and IP protection. Your formula stays yours.
solutions_packaging_cap_flex_desc: Regulatory-compliant label development for US FDA, EU, ASEAN, China, Middle East and more. Nutrition facts, ingredient declarations, allergen warnings, and claims substantiation.
solutions_packaging_cap_pack_desc: Multi-language label production with native translation validation. Supporting 15+ languages for global market access with consistent brand presentation.
solutions_packaging_cap_quality_desc: Eco-friendly packaging options including recyclable, biodegradable, and post-consumer recycled materials. FSC-certified paper and food-grade RPET options available.
solutions_packaging_cap_rd_desc: Professional packaging design including structural design, material selection, and visual branding. Pouches, cans, boxes, stick packs, and custom formats.
solutions_packaging_cta_desc: Get a free packaging compliance review for your target markets. Our regulatory team will assess your current labels and recommend improvements.
solutions_packaging_overview: Navigate complex global labeling regulations with confidence. We provide end-to-end packaging design and regulatory-compliant labeling services covering 30+ countries, ensuring your products meet every market's requirements.
solutions_packaging_overview_en: Navigate complex global labeling regulations with confidence — 30+ country compliance
solutions_page_desc: End-to-end OEM/ODM manufacturing solutions for health food, beverages, and nutraceutical brands
solutions_rd_cap_flex_desc: Global ingredient supply chain with strict quality screening. Sourcing functional actives, natural extracts, vitamins, minerals, and specialty raw materials.
solutions_rd_cap_pack_desc: Professional sensory evaluation panel with trained tasters. Flavor profiling, stability testing, and accelerated shelf-life studies for all product categories.
solutions_rd_cap_quality_desc: HACCP/FDA/ISO triple certified R&D facility. Full batch documentation, ingredient traceability, and third-party lab verification available.
solutions_rd_cap_rd_desc: Full-spectrum formula development from concept to production-ready recipe. Custom functional ingredients, flavor masking, and nutritional optimization.
solutions_rd_cta_desc: Get in touch with our R&D team. Free consultation on your formulation project — professional response within 24 hours.
solutions_rd_overview: From concept to finished formulation — our in-house R&D team brings 20+ years of functional food and beverage expertise. We develop custom recipes, optimize sensory profiles, and maintain a proprietary library of 200+ proven formulas.
solutions_rd_overview_en: From concept to finished formulation — in-house R&D with 200+ recipe library

user_agreement_intro: Welcome to Foshan Yuqianli Technology Co., Ltd. (hereinafter referred to as 'we'). By accessing or using our website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.
user_agreement_section_1_content: By accessing our website, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use our services.
user_agreement_section_2_content: Our services are designed for health food OEM/ODM consultation, quoting, and procurement. We specialize in functional beverages, meal replacements, beauty supplements, and weight management products.
user_agreement_section_3_content: All product specifications, prices, and availability are subject to change without notice. Final prices are confirmed upon formal quotation.
user_agreement_section_4_content: All orders are governed by Incoterms 2020. Unless otherwise agreed in writing, freight, duties, and import taxes are borne by the buyer.
user_agreement_section_5_content: Our products meet international food safety standards. Warranty terms are specified in formal sales contracts.
user_agreement_section_6_content: All product designs, trademarks, and content on this website are the property of Foshan Yuetiaoli Technology Co., Ltd.
user_agreement_section_7_content: We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our products or services.
user_agreement_section_8_content: These terms are governed by the laws of the People's Republic of China. Any disputes shall be resolved through amicable negotiation or submitted to the competent court in Foshan, Guangdong.
user_agreement_section_9_content: If you have any questions about these terms, please contact us via WhatsApp, email at support@brew.yukoli.com, or through the contact form on our website.

pdp_not_found_desc: Sorry, this product was not found.
meta_products_coffee_description: YuKoLi Technology Coffee Mix OEM/ODM — Customization of various flavors including instant coffee, latte, cappuccino
meta_products_tea_description: YuKoLi Technology Tea & Milk Tea OEM/ODM — Bubble tea powders, fruit tea, herbal tea, pure tea
meta_products_meal_description: YuKoLi Technology Meal Replacement OEM/ODM — Meal shakes, protein powders, protein bars
meta_products_beauty_description: YuKoLi Technology Beauty Collagen OEM/ODM — Collagen peptides, bird nest collagen powder
meta_products_weight_description: YuKoLi Technology Weight Management OEM/ODM — Fat-burning coffee, dietary fiber, meal replacement powder
meta_products_gut_description: YuKoLi Technology Gut Health OEM/ODM — Probiotics, prebiotics, dietary fiber
meta_products_lifestyle_description: YuKoLi Technology Functional Drinks OEM/ODM — Sleep, immunity, energy supplementation
meta_products_all_description: Explore YuKoLi full range of products solutions. Filter by category to find the best solution for your business.
meta_solutions_oem_description: YuKoLi Technology — You supply the formula, we handle the rest. Contract manufacturing with recipe confidentiality and full quality assurance.
meta_solutions_odm_description: YuKoLi Technology — We develop the formula, you build the brand. Full private label service from R&D to finished products.
meta_solutions_obm_description: YuKoLi Technology — From zero to one, we build your brand together. Full-chain support from brand strategy to market operations.
meta_solutions_rd_description: YuKoLi Technology R&D and Flavor Lab — Formula customization, functional ingredient tuning, taste testing and optimization.
meta_solutions_packaging_description: YuKoLi Technology Packaging Design and Global Label Compliance — Eco-friendly packaging, 30+ country label compliance.
meta_about_description: YuKoLi Technology — 20+ years OEM/ODM health food manufacturing experience, 4 factories, 7 product lines, certified exporting to 30+ countries.
solutions_odm_flow_delivery_desc: Finished products delivered to your warehouse or distribution center within 45–60 days. Full documentation, inspection reports, and regulatory compliance included.
solutions_odm_flow_formula_desc: Our R&D team develops custom formulas from a library of 200+ recipes, tailored to your target market, flavor profile, and functional requirements.
solutions_odm_flow_label_desc: Professional packaging and label design that reflects your brand identity. From concept sketches to print-ready files, we handle the creative process.
solutions_odm_flow_production_desc: Scalable batch production with rigorous quality control. MOQ 5,000+. Raw material sourcing, blending, filling, and packaging all in-house.
solutions_odm_testimonial_1_quote: "YuKoLi took our concept and turned it into a market-ready product in under 60 days. The formula development was spot-on and the packaging design exceeded our expectations."
solutions_odm_testimonial_2_quote: "The best decision we made was choosing YuKoLi as our private label partner. Their R&D team created three winning formulas from our brief and the quality is consistently excellent."
solutions_odm_why_partner_desc: Your brand is our priority. Flexible MOQ, dedicated project management, and transparent pricing with no hidden costs.
solutions_odm_why_quality_desc: FDA/HACCP/ISO certified facilities. Full batch inspection, third-party lab testing, and complete traceability.
solutions_odm_why_speed_desc: Sample within 7 days, production in 45–60 days. Our ready formula library eliminates months of R&D.
